title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
